evaluated_jobs.drafted_proposal: As an AI Engineer, I've built scalable voice AI systems handling 2,000+ concurrent calls, optimizing LLM cold-start times by 10.4x from 3.9 seconds to 378 milliseconds. My expertise aligns with your AI/ML needs: I work with Python, PyTorch, and LightGBM for model development, and have hands-on experience with RAG pipelines, LLM fine-tuning (including LLaMA LoRA), and frameworks like LangChain and CrewAI. I've deployed production APIs using FastAPI and integrated speech technologies like Deepgram STT and ElevenLabs TTS. Beyond voice AI, I've trained models on 716K+ records and reduced AI-content detection rates from 100% to 30%. I'm confident I can contribute to your projects. Let's discuss how I can help achieve your goals.

evaluated_jobs.job_title: Job Title: AI Consultant - CTE Data Science & AI Programs (Part-Time, Remote)
evaluated_jobs.drafted_proposal:
With a background in building scalable AI systems, I engineered a production voice AI that managed over 2,000 concurrent calls, demonstrating robust real-time performance. My work directly involved optimizing LLM pipelines, cutting cold-start latency from 3.9 seconds to 378 milliseconds—a 10.4x improvement.

My technical stack aligns perfectly with your needs: I have hands-on experience with large language models like GPT-4 and Gemini, including fine-tuning LLaMA with LoRA, and I'm proficient in agent frameworks such as CrewAI and LangChain for orchestrating AI workflows. I've implemented RAG systems using Pinecone and built APIs with FastAPI, ensuring seamless integration.

I've also trained LightGBM models on datasets exceeding 716,000 records and reduced AI-generated content detection rates from 100% to 30%. I'm excited to apply this production-scale expertise to your CTE Data Science & AI programs. Let's discuss how I can contribute to your projects.
